summary: Classified the live PR inventory shard conservatively from the hydrated preflight artifact. No shared canonical was selected, no close/merge/fix action is planned, and the only security-sensitive linked ref is routed separately. Most PRs remain open as related or independent backlog items because proof, author follow-up, conflicts, or review gates are still pending; two green/ready PRs need maintainer review before any merge decision.
